description: Trustworthy GF(3) qutrit bivariate-bicycle code baselines from the sweep + independent adversarial verification (results/gf3_report.md). Tiers: 'exact' = MILP-certified; 'upper_bound' = multi-method-agreed ceiling (true d may be lower); refuted incumbents are listed with corrected d<=.
verified_by: qldpc GUF/QDistRnd + from-scratch GF(3) ISD + MILP weight-cut certification

certified_exact.note: highest certified-exact FOM; d=8 proven (two-sided weight-cut MILP infeasibility + weight-8 witness, GUF-corroborated)
certified exact (MILP exact=True, all 12 logicals optimal)
certified exact d=6 by 4 independent methods
certified exact; may coincide with the other (6,3) [[36,4,6]] under relabeling

upper_bound.note: highest trustworthy FOM (ceiling); GUF+MILP+ISD converge on 12, none certified
d bracketed in [7,11]: d>=7 CERTIFIED (all logicals infeasible at w<=6), d<=11 multi-method

refuted_incumbents.note: MILP incumbent d<=15 was LOOSE; weight-12 logical found by 2 independent methods. FOM 12.5 -> <=8.0
loose incumbent; weight-12 logical found independently. FOM 10.67 -> <=6.0
